goal: Mount a guarded runtime dry-run route that exposes the BPK-017 route contract and BPK-013 dry-run adapter plan without calling the orchestrator, providers, database, GitHub, deploy, or live AICOS. The route must be default-off behind BLUEPILOT_RUNTIME_DRY_RUN_ROUTE_ENABLED=true and return only a contract plan.
scope_out: Do not call orchestrateTask or reuse /probe/dry-run execution.
Do not call providers, DB, GitHub, live AICOS, deploy, or write paths.
Do not add package scripts, dependencies, workflow changes, frontend files, or deployment changes.
Do not change BPK-013 or BPK-017 semantics.
claims: The runtime dry-run route can be mounted default-off without executing runtime work.
When enabled, the route returns only a BPK-017 contract response containing a BPK-013 dry-run plan.
The route requires POST, the BPK-017 confirm phrase, and a non-empty instruction.
The route never calls the orchestrator, provider, DB, GitHub, deploy, or live AICOS paths.
assumptions: A later block may decide whether this contract-only route should invoke a real dry-run execution path.
The default-off env guard is acceptable for a runtime boundary mount.
Returning a dry-run plan is useful operator evidence even before execution is opened.
dod: builder/src/runtimeDryRunRoute.ts implements a default-off handler for /probe/runtime-dry-run.
builder/src/server.ts mounts the handler before generic health handling.
The handler returns 403 when disabled, 405 for non-POST, 400 for invalid request, and 200 for a ready contract plan.
builder/tests/runtimeDryRunRoute.test.ts covers disabled, wrong method, missing confirm, success, and no execution side effects.
review-packets/BPK-020.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused route test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: A real orchestrator call, provider call, DB write, GitHub write, deploy, live AICOS call, package change, workflow change, or frontend file becomes necessary.
Changing BPK-013 or BPK-017 behavior becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-017 defined the dry-run route contract without mounting it. BPK-020 may mount a default-off route that returns only the contract plan.
